title: Current Erasmus+ call for application
summary: Student Erasmus Applications for the 2026/27 Academic Year.
body: Eötvös Loránd University announces the invitation to apply for Erasmus+ student mobility programme for the 2026/2027 Academic Year. Current calls for applications in the Erasmus+ programme Application deadline: 23rd February 2026 Info workshop available here: International opportunities - information sessions Contact at the faculty: erasmus@inf.elte.hu More information: Info for Outgoing Erasmus Students
